title: No Ghast Grief
description: Disables that ghasts can destroy blocks when shooting fireballs
body:
# No Ghast Grief Datapack **Ghast fireballs no longer destroy blocks** but also **Ghast fireballs no longer do any damage**
Questions or issues? -> [discord server](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6) | _or create an issue on github_
